name: Zippy Kidney Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree the beans to a coarse paste.
(Beans may also be mashed by hand.)
2. Transfer the puréed beans to a bowl and add all of the remaining ingredients.
3. Mix well until combined.
4. Serve at room temperature.
Makes about 2 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Sirloin Steak, Celery, Jicama, Cabbage, Swiss Cheese
